title: Substitutions
documentation:
## Purpose

Substitutions carry a JSON object whose keys and values are plain strings. They are used to fill template placeholders in queries, prompts, or other parameterized content before execution.

## When to use

Use this media type when a node needs to receive a dynamic set of variable bindings at runtime. Pair it with [Query Name](https://capdag.com/browse/media:query-name;textable) to identify the query to execute and supply the values that replace its placeholders.

## Notes

Keys and values must both be strings. Nesting is not supported; flatten complex structures into dot-separated or underscore-separated key names before passing them as substitutions.
